creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Updates port to v.1.2.5.

The file files/patch-configure in the port is removed.

The tarball of this port is currently hosted at:

http://filebin.ca/gwhdrt/bitlbee-otr-1.2.5.tar.bz2 (temporary)
http://fbsd.zlonet.ru/distfiles/bitlbee-otr-1.2.5.tar.bz2 (works for now, but not much reliable)

Can some committer please move it to FreeBSD FTP mirror and a mirror of their own and also update the MASTER_SITES in the ports Makefile accordingly.

Thanks
Ashish SHUKLA
